# shadowbroker-deployment — Full LLM Context

## Identity

Project name: shadowbroker-deployment
Internal brand: BLACKTIVISM OSINT
Version: v0.4 (BLACKTIVISM v0.4)
Vercel team: aigency0
Vercel project: subterfuge-shadowbroker
Repo: https://github.com/AReid987/shadowbroker-deployment
Branch: main

## What It Is

A covert geospatial intelligence (OSINT) platform built as a Next.js 14 application. It presents a convincing decoy landing page to the public while hiding a real-time global intelligence dashboard behind key-based authentication. No database. No user accounts. Single secret key.

## Technical Stack

- Framework: Next.js 14.0.4 (App Router)
- Runtime: React 18.2, TypeScript 5.3
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 3.3, OKLCH design tokens
- Map: MapLibre GL JS (dynamic import, SSR disabled)
- Auth: crypto-js 4.2 (AES-256 encryption, SHA-256 hashing)
- Animation: Framer Motion 10 (decoy page)
- Icons: Lucide React 0.294
- Deploy: Vercel (frontend), optional Fly.io (backend)

## Directory Structure

```
src/
  app/
    page.tsx               # Root route → DecoyLanding component
    layout.tsx             # Root layout: JetBrains Mono + VT323 fonts
    globals.css            # OKLCH tokens, glass-surface class, font imports
    dashboard/
      page.tsx             # Tactical display (323 lines, client component)
    api/
      auth/
        validate/          # POST: key → AES session token → cookie
        session/           # GET: decrypt + validate session token
      proxy/
        shodan/            # GET: server-side Shodan API proxy
      cctv/                # GET: CCTV camera list
      codes/               # POST/GET: admin invite code management
  components/
    landing/
      DecoyLanding.tsx     # Decoy page (388 lines): absurdist services + Konami trigger
      CovertLogin.tsx      # Trigger wrapper component
    auth/
      HiddenAuth.tsx       # Auth modal (166 lines): key input, rate limit UX
    map/
      ShadowbrokerMap.tsx  # 53KB MapLibre map engine — all 22 layers rendered here
    panels/
      LayerPanel.tsx       # 182 lines: 22 layer toggles, categorized, searchable
      SearchBar.tsx        # Geocoder / location search
      VisualModeSelector.tsx # DEFAULT/SATELLITE/FLIR/NVG/CRT mode picker
      KeyboardShortcuts.tsx  # Keyboard handler for layer + mode shortcuts
      CctvViewer.tsx       # Embedded CCTV camera feed panel
      DossierPanel.tsx     # Entity intelligence dossier (9880 bytes)
    ui/
      Toast.tsx            # Toast notifications + useToasts hook
  lib/
    auth.ts               # hashKey, validateKey, createSession, validateSession,
                          # checkRateLimit, recordAttempt (157 lines)
    rateLimit.ts          # checkServerRateLimit, recordServerAttempt (54 lines)
                          # In-memory Map — resets on serverless cold start
    inviteCodes.ts        # createCode, revokeCode, validateCode, listCodes (68 lines)
    data/                 # 21 data fetcher modules:
      aircraft.ts         # fetchMilitaryAircraft → adsb.lol/v2/mil
      commercialFlights.ts # fetchCommercialFlights → adsb.lol bbox queries (8 regions)
      vessels.ts          # fetchVessels → aisstream.io/api/v0/latest + 20-ship fallback
      carriers.ts         # 20 hardcoded carrier strike group positions
      cctv.ts             # 213 lines: CctvCamera interface + Digitraffic.fi cameras
      cctvPipeline.ts     # 29KB: CCTV aggregation + health check pipeline
      satellites.ts       # 24 notable satellites (TLE-derived static positions)
      radios.ts           # KiwiSDR network nodes (21)
      mesh.ts             # APRS mesh network nodes (26)
      gpsJamming.ts       # GPS jamming zones (15 active)
      earthquakes.ts      # USGS GeoJSON M2.5+ last 7 days
      volcanoes.ts        # 60 active/notable volcanoes
      fires.ts            # NASA FIRMS fire hotspots
      weather.ts          # Severe weather alerts
      airquality.ts       # OpenAQ v3 air quality sensors
      eonet.ts            # NASA EONET earth events
      conflicts.ts        # 15 conflict zones with status (static)
      trains.ts           # 19 major rail routes (static GeoJSON-like)
      shodan.ts           # Shodan Search API (via /api/proxy/shodan)
      outages.ts          # Internet outage monitoring
      infrastructure.ts   # 68KB static: 200+ bases, 500+ power plants, 30 data centers
    utils/
      fetchWithRetry.ts   # Retry + AbortController timeout wrapper
      dataCache.ts        # localStorage TTL cache (prefix: sb_, default TTL: 5min)
      useDataHealth.ts    # React hook for layer health status
      useSmartToast.ts    # Context-aware toast hook
  middleware.ts           # Next.js Edge middleware: /dashboard requires shadow_session cookie
```

## Authentication Architecture

### Key Validation (src/lib/auth.ts:34)
```typescript
function constantTimeCompare(a: string, b: string): boolean {
  if (a.length !== b.length) return false
  let result = 0
  for (let i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
    result |= a.charCodeAt(i) ^ b.charCodeAt(i)
  }
  return result === 0
}
```

### Session Token (src/lib/auth.ts:48)
Plaintext before AES encryption:
```json
{ "keyHash": "SHA256(key + SECRET_KEY)", "timestamp": 1716000000000, "expiry": 1716003600000 }
```
Stored as: `shadow_session=AES_ciphertext; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict; Path=/`

### Rate Limiting
- Client-side: localStorage timestamps, 5 attempts / 15-min window
- Server-side: In-memory Map keyed by X-Forwarded-For IP, same policy

## Data Layer Pattern

Every data module (21 total) uses this exact three-tier pattern:
1. `fetchWithRetry(URL, {retries: 2, timeout: 8000})`
2. Transform response to local TypeScript interface
3. `setCache(KEY, result)` → on error: `getCache(KEY) || STATIC_FALLBACK`

### External APIs Used

| API | URL | Key Required | Layer |
|-----|-----|-------------|-------|
| adsb.lol | api.adsb.lol/v2/mil | No | Military aircraft |
| adsb.lol | api.adsb.lol/v2/lat/.../dist/500 | No | Commercial flights |
| aisstream.io | aisstream.io/api/v0/latest | Yes (NEXT_PUBLIC_AISTREAM_API_KEY) | Vessels |
| USGS | earthquake.usgs.gov/earthquakes/feed/v1.0/summary/2.5_week.geojson | No | Earthquakes |
| NASA EONET | eonetapi.nasa.gov/v3/events | No | Earth events |
| Digitraffic.fi | weathercam.digitraffic.fi/*.jpg | No | CCTV cameras |
| OpenAQ | api.openaq.org/v3/locations | Optional | Air quality |
| Shodan | /api/proxy/shodan (server proxy) | Yes (SHODAN_API_KEY, server-only) | Devices |

## Intelligence Layer Catalog

22 layers in 8 categories:

Surveillance: cctv (900+ cameras, on by default)
Aviation: flights_military (on by default), flights_commercial
Maritime: ships, carriers
Ground: trains
Space: satellites
SIGINT: radios, mesh, gps_jamming
Environment: earthquakes (on), volcanoes (on), fires, weather, air_quality
Infrastructure: infrastructure_bases, infrastructure_power, infrastructure_datacenters, outages
Geopolitics: conflict
Overlays: daynight (on), shodan

Layer configuration in src/components/panels/LayerPanel.tsx:38

## Dashboard State

React useState only (no external state library):
- activeLayers: Record<string, boolean> — which layers are on
- visualMode: 'DEFAULT' | 'SATELLITE' | 'FLIR' | 'NVG' | 'CRT'
- health: HealthMap — per-layer { status: 'online' | 'degraded' | 'offline' }
- stats: LayerStats — per-layer entity count
- activeCamera: CctvCamera | null — currently focused CCTV
- refreshKey: number — incremented to force data reload

URL state sync (debounced 300ms): ?layers=cctv,satellites&mode=FLIR

## Design System

OKLCH color system:
- --aig-void-deep: oklch(0.10 0.015 250) — page background
- --aig-void-base: oklch(0.13 0.015 250) — panels
- --aig-void-raised: oklch(0.17 0.015 250) — controls
- --aig-void-glass: oklch(0.20 0.020 250) — glass surfaces
- --aig-accent-warm: oklch(0.75 0.150 65) — amber highlights
- --aig-accent-warm-dim: oklch(0.55 0.100 65) — dimmed amber

Typography: JetBrains Mono (primary), VT323 (display/TTY), Share Tech Mono (fallback)
Constraints: 0px border-radius on all instrument surfaces, no drop shadows, Bayer matrix dither

## Environment Variables

Required:
- SECRET_KEY: master authentication key
- ENCRYPTION_KEY: 32-char AES session encryption key

Optional:
- BACKEND_URL: external Shadowbroker backend
- SESSION_DURATION: default 3600000 (1 hour)
- RATE_LIMIT_MAX: default 5
- RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW: default 900000 (15 minutes)
- NEXT_PUBLIC_AISTREAM_API_KEY: live AIS vessel data
- SHODAN_API_KEY: server-only, never NEXT_PUBLIC_

## Security Headers (next.config.js:18)

HSTS max-age=63072000 includeSubDomains preload
X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block
Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
CSP: default-src 'self', scripts self+unsafe-eval+googleapis, no external frames

## Known Failure Modes

1. SECRET_KEY leaked → rotate + redeploy immediately
2. Server-side rate limiter resets on serverless cold start → use Redis for production
3. Sessions only validated on mount, not mid-session → stale sessions remain until page refresh
4. localStorage cache grows unbounded → no pruning of old keys
5. adsb.lol rate limited → military/commercial aircraft empty (no fallback)

## Decoy Landing Triggers

DecoyLanding.tsx implements three hidden access methods:
1. Konami code (↑↑↓↓←→←→BA) — window.addEventListener('keydown')
2. Copyright/footer click 5× within 3 seconds — click counter with timeout reset
3. Direct navigation to /login or /api/auth/* routes
